context: Tests whether the agent structures a dbt project with the prescribed layer materialization settings, filters, macros, incremental strategy, and documentation patterns for e-commerce Shopify data.

checklist.name: Staging materialized as view
checklist.description: dbt_project.yml configures the staging layer with +materialized: view

checklist.name: Intermediate materialized as ephemeral
checklist.description: dbt_project.yml configures the intermediate layer with +materialized: ephemeral

checklist.name: Marts materialized as table
checklist.description: dbt_project.yml configures the marts layer with +materialized: table

checklist.name: Staging schema separation
checklist.description: dbt_project.yml sets +schema: staging for the staging layer and +schema: analytics (or similar) for the marts layer

checklist.name: Fivetran deleted filter
checklist.description: The staging orders model filters out soft-deleted records using the _fivetran_deleted column (e.g. WHERE _fivetran_deleted = false)

checklist.name: Voided/pending order filter
checklist.description: The final fact model (fct_order_items) excludes orders with financial_status in ('voided', 'pending')

checklist.name: UTM parameter extraction
checklist.description: The staging orders model extracts utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign from the landing_site column (via macro, regex, or parsing function)

checklist.name: Incremental fact model
checklist.description: The fct_order_items model uses incremental materialization (materialized='incremental' or config block) with a unique_key specified

checklist.name: is_current join pattern
checklist.description: The fact model joins to dimension tables filtering on is_current = true

checklist.name: Not_null and unique tests
checklist.description: schema.yml includes both unique and not_null tests on the primary key column of fct_order_items

checklist.name: Referential integrity test
checklist.description: schema.yml includes a relationships test on a foreign key column (e.g. customer_key referencing dim_customers)

checklist.name: Accepted range test on revenue
checklist.description: schema.yml includes a dbt_utils.accepted_range or accepted_values test with min_value: 0 on a revenue column

checklist.name: Model descriptions documented
checklist.description: schema.yml includes description fields for at least the fct_order_items model and two or more of its columns
